word: G1333 - διετία - dietía - dee-et-ee'-a - Two years

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διετία

- Transliteration: Dietia

- Phonetic: dee-et-ee'-a

- Definition:

1. the space of two years

- Origin: from G1332

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G1332; a space of two years (biennium): - two years.
